libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Write generated tests against Jackson 3 imports such as `tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode` and `tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper`, matching the `JsonQuery.apply` and `Scope` signatures in 2.0.0-alpha1. Do not keep the old `com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.*` imports from the 1.6.2 test, and do not add `com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind` just to satisfy those old imports.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8741 [Automation] javac compile fails for net.thisptr:jackson-jq:2.0.0-alpha1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 1.6.2 test fails under 2.0.0-alpha1 because it imports Jackson 2 `com.fasterxml` classes while the new artifact depends on Jackson 3 `tools.jackson.core:jackson-databind:3.0.3`.
Adding Jackson 2 databind would not be the right setup because the library methods now accept and return `tools.jackson.databind` types, so Jackson 2 `JsonNode` values would be type-incompatible.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed; jackson-jq 2.0.0-alpha1 migrated its public API to Jackson 3 `tools.jackson.*` types, which are already supplied transitively.
